title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst
London or Paris (Hybrid – 3 days onsite)
£70,000 - £80,000 + equity + benefits
Our client is a fast-growing fintech operating in the global payments and trade space, focused on improving financial access in emerging markets. They are looking for a Data Analyst to join at a key stage of growth and help shape the data function.
This is a high-impact, hands-on role with strong exposure to senior stakeholders and the opportunity to influence how data is used across the business.
You will work as part of a central data team, delivering analytics that drive decision-making across Finance, Operations, Product, and Compliance. You’ll translate complex business problems into structured analysis and scalable data solutions.
Key Responsibilities
Partner with teams across Finance, Treasury, Operations, and Compliance
Build internal tools to support visibility, performance tracking, and risk management
Analyse operational performance and identify areas for improvement
Support financial analysis (e.g. revenue, unit economics, forecasting)
Develop dashboards and self-serve reporting capabilities
Deliver deep-dive analysis to support leadership and strategic decisions
Support data infrastructure, pipelines, and data model development
Candidate Profile
6–8+ years in Data Analytics, Data Science, or similar
Advanced SQL and strong data modelling experience
Experience with modern data warehouses (e.g. Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Postgres)
Experience working with cross-functional stakeholders
Strong communication skills with ability to translate data into business insights
Desirable
Fintech or financial services experience (payments, FX, risk, or treasury)
Python experience (e.g. pandas, automation, modelling)
Experience with financial metrics (revenue, forecasting, unit economics)
Strong commercial mindset and attention to data accuracy
What’s on Offer
Competitive salary up to £80,000 + equity
Hybrid working (3 days onsite)
High-impact role with strong ownership
Exposure to senior leadership and strategic work
Fast-paced, collaborative environment
Sound like you? Apply now!
